title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Hypercity Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Hypercity Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Hypercity Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hypercity Advisory Limited:
Hypercity Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
